name: password_reset_code

metadata.description: Password reset email that delivers a short verification code (used by on_user_forgot when method == 'code').
notes: `user` is a dict (user.to_dict('basic')) auto-injected by User.send_template_email if missing.
Keep wording neutral and avoid leaking account existence; endpoint already returns a generic message.

text_template:
Hello{% if user.display_name %} {{ user.display_name }}{% endif %},

Use the verification code below to reset your password:

{{ code }}

This code expires soon. If you didn't request a password reset, you can ignore this email.
html_template:
Password reset

Hello{% if user.display_name %} {{ user.display_name }}{% endif %},

Use the verification code below to reset your password.

Verification code
{{ code }}

This code expires soon. If you didn't request a password reset, you can ignore this email.

Sent by Django-MOJO
